summary: Completed testing of Iteration 20 features: Score on Match Cards and ConsultantDashboard Layout Fix. All features verified working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/schedule returns 'score' field for matches with live data
Backend: Match ipl2026_008 has score 'MI 41/2 (6 ov)' in schedule
Backend: Match ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT) has no score yet (as expected)
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/promote-now syncs live scores to schedule
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns cached live data with score
Backend: 2 live matches correctly identified (ipl2026_008, ipl2026_009)
Backend: GET /api/ shows scheduler active with next_runs=['4:00 PM IST', '7:00 PM IST']
Frontend: Score 'MI 41/2 (6 ov)' displayed on match card for MI vs DC
Frontend: ConsultantDashboard renders without horizontal overflow (dashboardWidth=453px, parentWidth=453px)
Frontend: No 3-column grid (lg:grid-cols-12) found in ConsultantDashboard
Frontend: ConsultantDashboard uses single-column stacked layout
Frontend: Risk tolerance toggle, market odds inputs, market momentum all visible
Frontend: Run Consultation button visible and clickable
critical_code_review_comments: ConsultantDashboard.js correctly uses single-column stacked layout with space-y-4 for vertical spacing
Only grid-cols-2 used for appropriate 2-column layouts (market odds inputs, simulation scores, odds trend buttons)
No lg:grid-cols-12 or 3-column grid that caused overflow
server.py fetch_live_data() correctly updates ipl_schedule with score field (line 401-410)
server.py sync_live_scores_to_schedule() correctly syncs existing live snapshot scores to schedule (line 113-137)
MatchSelector.js line 272 correctly renders match.score on card with data-testid='match-score-{i}'
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing matches ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC with live data) and ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 features fully working. Key changes: (1) Score now shows on match cards on main page after live data is fetched - 'MI 41/2 (6 ov)' visible for ipl2026_008. (2) ConsultantDashboard layout fixed - no more 3-column grid causing overflow, now uses single-column stacked layout. (3) OddsComparison component removed. (4) sync_live_scores_to_schedule() runs on startup and after promote-now to sync scores. (5) Live matches: ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC, has score), ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT, no score yet).
